caption: On air now! The Asha Show, weekdays 6-9am on Rhythm FM 94.7. Today: new SA artists you need on your playlist. \ud83c\udfa7
Voices of the City this Tuesday: a Soweto community choir who will give you goosebumps. Season 3 rolls on. \ud83c\udf06
Friday salsa + cumbia set incoming. Turn it up, Joburg. Where are you listening from? \ud83d\udc83
Studio flat white from Lucky Bean before we go live. Fuel for three hours of good music. \u2615
Off-Mic is coming. Public pilot debut on the landing page 2 October, Episode 1 official launch 19 January. Landing page link in bio. This one is personal. \ud83c\udf99\ufe0f
Live session swipe \u27a1\ufe0f Mandla Sithole brought the Latin jazz into the studio today. New EP out now.
Sunday long run done at Emmarentia Dam with the Melville Running Club. Then straight to show prep. \ud83c\udfc3\ud83c\udffd\u200d\u2640\ufe0f
Tonight: live broadcast from Braam Social in Braamfontein. SA wine, new music, your requests. Come through. \ud83c\udf77
Behind the desk at Rhythm FM 94.7. Twelve years on Joburg radio and I still get butterflies before the mic goes hot.
Neo-soul Wednesday. Palesa Mokoena's new single gets its first Joburg spin at 4pm. Don't miss it. \ud83c\udfb6
Morning yoga before a full day in studio. Slow start, then full volume. \ud83e\uddd8\ud83c\udffd\u200d\u2640\ufe0f
Voices of the City featured Reverend Grace Moyo and her community kitchen in Soweto this week. Real stories, real people.
Crate digging at a Rosebank record store. Found a cumbia gem from 1974. It's going on the show tomorrow. \ud83c\udfb5
Lakeside Kitchen at Zoo Lake for the team lunch. We earned it after this week's run of shows. \ud83c\udf7d\ufe0f
Listener shout-outs Friday. Tag someone who never misses The Asha Show. Joburg, I see you. \ud83d\udc9c
Quick reel from today's studio session. New SA sound, full energy, your morning drive sorted. \ud83c\udfa4
Voices of the City Season 3 teaser. Three more profiles before the finale. Tuesdays at 07:20.
Off-Mic Pilot 2 cut and ready. Public pilot still locked for 2 October. Newsletter signups climbing.
Anniversary doc behind-the-scenes. Sipho and I are deep in the archive crates this month.
Half-marathon race week countdown. Joburg City Run, here we come.
